message:
fix: restore crate name to "tru" for crates.io publishing

The "toon" package name is owned by another party on crates.io.
Revert package name to "tru" and add explicit [lib] name = "toon"
so all source-level imports and the binary name remain "toon".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2656,34 +2656,6 @@ version = "0.1.1"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "1f3ccbac311fea05f86f61904b462b55fb3df8837a366dfc601a0161d0532f20"
 
-[[package]]
-name = "toon"
-version = "0.2.0"
-dependencies = [
- "anyhow",
- "assert_cmd",
- "asupersync",
- "chrono",
- "clap",
- "clap_complete",
- "console_error_panic_hook",
- "criterion",
- "insta",
- "js-sys",
- "predicates",
- "proptest",
- "rand",
- "serde",
- "serde_json",
- "tempfile",
- "thiserror",
- "tracing",
- "tracing-subscriber",
- "vergen-gix",
- "walkdir",
- "wasm-bindgen",
-]
-
 [[package]]
 name = "tracing"
 version = "0.1.44"
@@ -2758,6 +2730,34 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing-serde",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "tru"
+version = "0.2.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "anyhow",
+ "assert_cmd",
+ "asupersync",
+ "chrono",
+ "clap",
+ "clap_complete",
+ "console_error_panic_hook",
+ "criterion",
+ "insta",
+ "js-sys",
+ "predicates",
+ "proptest",
+ "rand",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "tempfile",
+ "thiserror",
+ "tracing",
+ "tracing-subscriber",
+ "vergen-gix",
+ "walkdir",
+ "wasm-bindgen",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "typenum"
 version = "1.19.0"

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [package]
-name = "toon"
+name = "tru"
 version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ license = "MIT"
 readme = "README.md"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
-documentation = "https://docs.rs/toon"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/tru"
 keywords = ["cli", "json", "serialization", "llm", "encoding"]
 categories = ["command-line-utilities", "encoding"]
 exclude = [
@@ -24,6 +24,10 @@ exclude = [
     "storage.sqlite3",
 ]
 
+[lib]
+name = "toon"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "toon"
 path = "src/main.rs"
